name: Chinese: Hot and Spicy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate for 15-20 minutes in a mixture of ginger, sherry, and light soy sauce.
2. Chop scallion and hot peppers diagonally into 1-inch pieces. Grind anise pepper to powder.
3. Mix together chicken broth, light soy sauce, wine vinegar, sugar, salt, and ground anise pepper in a separate bowl.
4. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add scallion and stir-fry for several minutes until fragrant.
6. Add ginger, sherry, and the marinated chicken to the scallion mixture. Stir-fry for 1-2 more minutes.
7. Pour in the chicken broth mixture and combine well.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the chicken pieces are tender.
9. Stir in cornstarch to thicken the sauce. Serve hot.
